zh.Arundel Castle, Sussex, England: 英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel於1285年5月1日出生在英國維爾爾馬爾波洛時，他的父親Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel18歲，母親Countess Alesia di Saluzzo15歲。他於1305年7月與Alice de Warenne在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年11月17日在英國賀福爾享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel于1285年5月1日出生在英国維爾爾馬爾波洛时，他的父亲Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel18岁，母亲Countess Alesia di Saluzzo15岁。他于1305年7月与Alice de Warenne在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1326年11月17日在英国賀福爾享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel was born on 1 May 1285, in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England, his father, Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel, was 18 and his mother, Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, was 15. He married Alice de Warenne in July 1305, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 17 November 1326, in Herefordshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel est né le 1 mai 1285, à Marlborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Warenne en juillet 1305, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 17 novembre 1326, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel am 1. Mai 1285 in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel 18 und seine Mutter Countess Alesia di Saluzzo 15. Er hat im Juli 1305 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England Alice de Warenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 17. November 1326 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Herefordshire, England und wurde in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel è nato il il 1 maggio 1285 nel Marlborough, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Warenne nel luglio 1305, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 17 novembre 1326, nel Herefordshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundelが1285年5月1日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルルボロウで生まれた時，父Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundelは18歳，母Countess Alesia di Saluzzoは15歳であった。1305年7月にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルでAlice de Warenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1326年11月17日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel(이)가 1285년 5월 1일 영국 윌츠히르 말를버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Alesia di Saluzzo(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1305년 7월 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 Alice de Warenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 11월 17일 영국 허퍼드실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.1 May 1285–17 November 1326: 1 de maio de 1285–17 de novembro de 1326
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel nasceu em 1 de maio de 1285, em Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Warenne em julho de 1305, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de novembro de 1326, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel родился 1 мая 1285 г. в местности марлбороую, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Warenne июль 1305 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 17 ноября 1326 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1 May 1285–17 November 1326: 1 de mayo de 1285–17 de noviembre de 1326
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel nació el 1 de mayo de 1285, en Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Alice de Warenne en julio de 1305, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 17 de noviembre de 1326, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
